justification: The diff comprehensively migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x, while adopting Java 21 idioms like text blocks (WebServiceApplication.java) and pattern matching for instanceof (AOP.java). It also modernizes String.format to String.formatted() across multiple files. However, the migration of Swagger annotations to OpenAPI 3 is incomplete in some files (e.g., missing @Schema on some fields or inconsistent application), and the diff includes some unrelated cleanup (removing unused imports) which slightly reduces coherence.
